title: Hiring Category Manager at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Reliance Digital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Gurgaon-based team.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
